about.title: About
about.headline: Infrastructure · AI · DevOps · Cloud Engineering
about.tagline: Building reliable systems at the edge of cloud and AI.
about.body:
I'm **Morgan Sinclair** — infrastructure, AI, DevOps, and cloud engineering.

I build systems that stay operable: edge platforms, automation, and the glue that turns models and services into something production-ready.

contact.body: Email, GitHub, LinkedIn, or X — pick whichever works best.
